scripts.validate: npm run test && npm run build
scripts.validate:visual: npm run validate:visual:blocking && npm run validate:visual:exploration && npm run validate:visual:level-one
scripts.validate:visual:level-one: python .agents/skills/validate-game-screenshots/scripts/analyze_layout.py docs/screenshots/level-1/level-1-mobile-short-controls.png docs/screenshots/level-1/level-1-mobile-short-controls.layout.json --output-dir docs/qa/2026-07-11-level-one/artifacts && python .agents/skills/validate-game-screenshots/scripts/analyze_layout.py docs/screenshots/level-1/level-1-bedroom-desktop.png docs/screenshots/level-1/level-1-bedroom-desktop.layout.json --output-dir docs/qa/2026-07-11-level-one/artifacts && python .agents/skills/validate-game-screenshots/scripts/analyze_layout.py docs/screenshots/level-1/level-1-kitchen-desktop.png docs/screenshots/level-1/level-1-kitchen-desktop.layout.json --output-dir docs/qa/2026-07-11-level-one/artifacts && python .agents/skills/validate-game-screenshots/scripts/analyze_layout.py docs/screenshots/level-1/level-1-office-desktop.png docs/screenshots/level-1/level-1-office-desktop.layout.json --output-dir docs/qa/2026-07-11-level-one/artifacts
